LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF FUSION SYSTEMS JAPAN K.K., A JAPANESE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2 AND 3 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVED ITS RIGHT TO SUE FOR AMOUNTS OWED TO INGENIUM. DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 3 BECAUSE THE AMOUNT OF PLAINTIFF'S JUDGMENT CANNOT BE DETERMINED WITHOUT KNOWING WHEN AND ON WHAT TERMS DEFENDANT PAID THE $2,500.00, BECAUSE THAT AFFECTS BOTH THE EXCHANGE RATE TO APPLY IN CREDITING THE AMOUNT AND WHETHER THE AMOUNT SHOULD BE APPLIED TO PRINCIPAL OR INTEREST, WHICH IN TURN WOULD AFFECT SUBSEQUENT INTEREST ACCRUAL. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DUY THAI, TEL. NO. 296-9927 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. GORDON I. ENDOW OF GORDON & REES LLP, TEL. NO. 986-5900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF FUSION SYSTEMS JAPAN K.K., A JAPANESE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is Denied as to Causes of action 2 and 3 because Plaintiff has not proved its right to sue for amounts owed to Ingenium. Denied as to Causes of action 1 and 3 because the amount of Plaintiff's Judgment cannot be determined without knowing when and on what terms Defendant paid the $ 2,500.00, because that affects both the exchange rate to apply in crediting the amount and whether the amount should be applied to Principal or Interest, which in turn would affect subsequent interest accrual. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Set For Trial On Aug-15-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-29-11 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 306

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF FUSION SYSTEMS JAPAN K.K., A JAPANESE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER OF DEFENDANT IA GLOBAL, INCORPORATED TO THE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. Opposing party to prepare form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 =(301/PJB)
